version_description: This is the Acoustic Version of the song rather than the original.

versions.version_description: This tab and chords are based on live version performed at Abbey Road (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymjNGjuBCTo).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Just putting this up to remember how this song goes~~~


Pick Pattern~

[tab] F (Bar Chord)
e|-1-1--|
B|-1-1--|
G|-2-2--|
D|-3-3--|
A|------|
E|1-----|[/tab]

[tab] F/A (Basically a normal OPEN F chord for those who don't know what F/A is)
e|-1-1--|
B|-1-1--|
G|-2-2--|
D|-3-3--|
A|0-----|
E|------|[/tab]

[tab] Bb (Bar Chord through whole song)
e|-1-1--|
B|-3-3--|
G|-3-3--|
D|-3-3--|
A|1-----|
E|------|[/tab]

[tab] C (Open Chord)
e|-0-0--|
B|-1-1--|
G|-0-0--|
D|-2-2--|
A|3-----|
E|------|[/tab]

Alternate Chord progression: F (Bar Chord), Fmaj7, Bb, C

---------------------------------------------------------------------

[Intro]
N.C.
F x2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I'm at a party I don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]F/A[/ch]
And I don't ever wear a suit and tie, I[/tab]

Wonderin' if I could sneak out the back
[tab]                               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Nobody's even lookin' me in my eyes[/tab]

And then you take my hand
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                             [ch]F[/ch]
Finish my drink, say, "Shall we dance?" (Hell Yeah)[/tab]
N.C.
You know I love ya, did I ever tell ya?

You make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Don't think I fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]
Everyone's got so much to say, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I always feel like I'm nobody, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Who wants to fit in anyway?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F/A[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]

And you're making me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

Mmm, Mmm, Mmm, Mmm
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F/A[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

Mmm, Mmm, Mmm, Mmm


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
We at a party we don't wanna be at[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F/A[/ch]
Tryna talk, but we can't hear ourselves[/tab]
N.C.
Read your lips, I'd rather kiss 'em right back

With all these people all around
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
I'm crippled with anxiety[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
But I'm told it's where I'm s'posed to be[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
You know what? It's kinda crazy 'cause I really don't mind[/tab]

When you make it better like that


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Don't think we fit in at this party[/tab]
[tab][ch]F/A[/ch]
Everyone's got so much to say, yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
When we walked in, I said I'm sorry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
But now I think that we should stay[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]F/A[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]

Yeah, you're making me feel like maybe I am somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

Mmm, Mmm, Mmm, Mmm
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F/A[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights when I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

Mmm, Mmm, Mmm, Mmm


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't like nobody but you, baby, I don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't like nobody but you, I hate everyone here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I don't like nobody but you, baby, yeah[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care[/tab]

When I'm with my baby, yeah
[tab]                          [ch]F/A[/ch]
All the bad things disappear[/tab]

And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

Mmm, Mmm, Mmm, Mmm
[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause I don't care as long as you just hold me near[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F/A[/ch]
You can take me anywhere[/tab]

And you're making me feel like I'm loved by somebody
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I can deal with the bad nights[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm with my baby, yeah[/tab]

When I'm with my baby, yeah
